message:
perf(spec-evolution): cache rendered spec HTML and diff HTML to avoid redundant markdown/diff2html processing

Add specHtmlCache and diffHtmlCache maps to memoize the output of
marked.parse and Diff2Html.html rendering. On revisiting a previously
viewed snapshot or diff mode, the cached HTML is returned immediately
instead of re-parsing markdown or re-generating diff output. This
eliminates noticeable lag when navigating back and forth in the spec
evolution timeline.

Fix useEffect dependency arrays to include currentIdx so renders
correctly invalidate when the snapshot index changes independently
of the query data reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
